description: Response Summarization & Token Optimization — Add summary parameter to all list tools for 70%+ token reduction
constraints: Follow existing 3-layer pattern: MCP Tool → Service → API
Use Zod schemas as plain objects (not z.object()), matching existing tools
All tools must be registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Vendor media types required for all API calls (Accept + Content-Type headers)
deno task check && deno task lint && deno fmt --check must all pass
Do NOT modify single-resource tools (get_issue, get_project, etc.) — only list tools
summary parameter must default to true
Summarized responses must use {total, items, note} wrapper format
nonGoals: Server-side pagination UI or cursor management
New API endpoints or Polaris API changes
Adding summary to single-resource get tools

glossary.summary mode: When summary=true (default), responses are trimmed to essential fields only
glossary.summarizer: A function that takes a full API object and returns a trimmed version with only essential fields
glossary.universal strip fields: _links, _type, tenantId, _collection — always removed in summary mode

userStories.title: Create summarization utility module
userStories.description: Create src/mcp/summarize.ts with summarizeResponse() wrapper and per-resource summarizer functions. Each summarizer strips _links, _type, tenantId, _collection and keeps only essential fields.
acceptanceCriteria: src/mcp/summarize.ts exports summarizeResponse(items, summarizer, note?) that returns {total, items, note}
Exports summarizePortfolio: keeps {id, name, organizationId}
Exports summarizeApplication: keeps {id, name, description}
Exports summarizeProject: keeps {id, name, defaultBranch: {id, name}}
Exports summarizeBranch: keeps {id, name, isDefault}
Exports summarizeIssue: keeps {id, name (from type.name), severity, cwe, file, line, toolType, status, firstDetectedOn} — extracts from occurrenceProperties and triageProperties arrays
Exports summarizeOccurrence: keeps {id, issueId, severity, file, line, toolType} — extracts from properties array
Exports summarizeTest: keeps {id, status, assessmentType, scanMode, startedAt, completedAt}
Exports summarizeBugTrackingConfig: keeps {id, type, url, enabled}
Exports summarizeLinkedIssue: keeps {id, issueId, issueKey, issueLink, status}
Exports summarizeExternalProject: keeps {id, key, name}
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Issue severity/cwe/file/line are in occurrenceProperties array as {key, value} pairs — use .find(p => p.key === 'severity')?.value pattern
Issue status is in triageProperties array
Issue name comes from type.name (the nested type object)
Use optional chaining throughout — API may not always return all fields
ExternalProject is already small — summarizer mostly strips _links/_type

userStories.title: Add summary param to Portfolio list tools
userStories.description: Add summary boolean parameter to get_portfolios, get_applications, get_projects, get_branches, get_portfolio_branches, get_project_sub_resources, get_labels tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Each tool schema adds: summary: z.boolean().optional().describe('Return summarized results with only essential fields. Default: true. Set to false for full API response.')
Each handler destructures summary with default true: const { summary = true, ...rest } = args
When summary=true, handler calls summarizeResponse(results, appropriateSummarizer)
When summary=false, handler returns full results via jsonResponse(results) (existing behavior)
All modified tools still registered in src/mcp/tools/index.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: Import summarizeResponse and the appropriate summarizer from ../summarize.ts
For labels, create a simple summarizeLabel if not already in summarize.ts — keep {id, name, color}
Portfolio tools return arrays — check if the handler gets items via service call or direct API response
get_project_sub_resources returns mixed content — use the appropriate summarizer based on content type or create a generic one

userStories.title: Add summary param to Findings list tools
userStories.description: Add summary boolean parameter to get_issues, get_occurrences, get_issue_count (if it returns items), get_component_versions, get_component_origins, get_taxonomies tools.
acceptanceCriteria: get_issues handler uses summarizeIssue when summary=true
get_occurrences handler uses summarizeOccurrence when summary=true
get_component_versions handler uses a summarizer keeping {id, name, version, license} when summary=true
get_component_origins handler uses a summarizer keeping {id, name, type} when summary=true
get_taxonomies handler uses a summarizer keeping {id, name, standard} when summary=true
Add any new summarizers needed to src/mcp/summarize.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: get_issues already has complex handler logic with many params — add summary alongside existing params
Component versions/origins may need new summarizer functions added to summarize.ts
Check get_issue_count — if it only returns a number, skip it; if it returns items with counts, add summary

userStories.title: Add summary param to Bug Tracking & Tests list tools
userStories.description: Add summary boolean parameter to get_bug_tracking_configurations, get_external_projects, get_linked_issues, get_config_project_mappings, get_tests tools.
acceptanceCriteria: get_bug_tracking_configurations uses summarizeBugTrackingConfig when summary=true
get_external_projects uses summarizeExternalProject when summary=true
get_linked_issues uses summarizeLinkedIssue when summary=true
get_config_project_mappings uses a summarizer keeping {id, projectId, btsProjectKey, btsIssueType} when summary=true
get_tests uses summarizeTest when summary=true
Add any new summarizers needed to src/mcp/summarize.ts
Typecheck passes: deno task check

hints: ProjectMapping summarizer may need to check the actual type shape in polaris.ts
get_linked_issues can have many items — summarization here has high impact

userStories.title: Add summary param to SCM/Repos & remaining list tools
userStories.description: Add summary boolean parameter to any remaining list tools that return arrays: get_scm_repositories, get_scm_groups, get_scm_remote_repos, get_scm_projects, get_scm_providers, and any other list tools not yet covered.
acceptanceCriteria: All remaining list tools (tools that return arrays) have the summary parameter
Each uses an appropriate summarizer that strips _links, _type, tenantId and keeps essential fields
New summarizers added to src/mcp/summarize.ts as needed
deno task check passes
deno task lint passes
deno fmt --check passes

hints: Scan the index.ts imports to find any list tools not yet covered
SCM tools may have unique response shapes — read the tool handler to understand the response before writing a summarizer
For SCM repos: keep {id, name, url, provider}
For SCM groups: keep {id, name, provider}
